brand_vibe.description: Natural Luxury, minimalist, organic, high whitespace, botanical purity. Inspired by Penelope Care.
brand_vibe.emotion: Calm, pure, premium, trustworthy, and organic.

guidelines: Headings should primarily use font-light or font-normal to maintain an elegant, airy feel.
Never use default bold (font-bold) for large headings.
Ensure strong contrast for body text against backgrounds. Avoid pure black; use the charcoal olive defined in colors.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Allow products to breathe. Avoid cluttered rows.

grid_patterns.product_grid: grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-8 lg:gap-12

buttons.primary: bg-[#6B826E] text-white hover:bg-[#526654] transition-colors duration-300 rounded-sm px-8 py-4 text-sm uppercase tracking-widest
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#EAE6DF] text-[#2D332F] hover:border-[#6B826E] transition-colors duration-300 rounded-sm px-8 py-4 text-sm uppercase tracking-widest
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-[#6B826E] hover:bg-[#E8EFE9] transition-colors duration-300 rounded-sm px-6 py-3 text-sm

inputs.style: bg-white border border-[#EAE6DF] focus:border-[#6B826E] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#6B826E] rounded-sm px-4 py-3 text-[#2D332F] placeholder-[#9BA39D] transition-all outline-none

cards.product: group cursor-pointer bg-white p-6 transition-all duration-500 hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.06)] rounded-sm border border-transparent hover:border-[#EAE6DF]
cards.admin: bg-white p-6 border border-[#EAE6DF] rounded-sm shadow-sm

notifications.toast: bg-white border border-[#EAE6DF] text-[#2D332F] shadow-lg rounded-sm p-4 flex items-center gap-3

home_hero.layout: Split layout or full-width image with soft overlay. Text must be perfectly legible.
home_hero.elements: Large H1 (font-light), concise subtitle, primary CTA. Use earthy textures or high-quality botanical photography.
home_hero.overlay: If using text over image, apply a gradient overlay like bg-gradient-to-r from-[#F9F8F6]/90 to-transparent for text readability.

product_grid.layout: Grid with prominent image. Minimal metadata: Title, short description, Price (showing B2C by default, B2B if logged in), 'Add to Cart' button appearing on hover.
product_grid.filtering: Sidebar or top horizontal scrollable list with elegant minimalist pills (border only, solid on active).

product_detail_page.layout: Sticky product details on the right, large scrollable image gallery on the left. High white space.
product_detail_page.details: Clear typography, accordion for Ingredients & Usage. Dual pricing visibility if applicable (e.g. 'Log in for professional pricing' for guests).

cart_drawer.layout: Fixed right side, slide-in animation. Width: 400px (max-w-full on mobile).
cart_drawer.header: Clean 'Your Cart' with a delicate 'X' close icon.
cart_drawer.progress_bar: Free shipping progress bar (e.g., '€10 away from Free Shipping') using the primary Sage green.
cart_drawer.footer: Subtotal, Shipping note, and full-width Checkout button.

checkout.layout: Minimalist, no header navigation (logo only) to reduce distraction. 2-column layout on desktop: Form on left, Order Summary on right.
checkout.flow: Guest checkout by default, with a discreet 'Log in for B2B accounts' link.

login_register.layout: Split screen: Left side beautiful botanical imagery, right side clean login/register form.

admin_dashboard.layout: Sidebar navigation (dark green or light beige) + Main content area. Background #F2F4F2.
admin_dashboard.widgets: Key metrics (Orders, Revenue, Customers) using the 'Control Room' grid layout.
admin_dashboard.style: Functional, tight spacing (p-4 to p-6), high contrast for legibility, removing unnecessary decorations.

admin_orders_table.style: Shadcn UI table. Clean 1px borders. Status pills (e.g., Green for Delivered, Yellow for Pending). Pagination at the bottom.

micro_interactions.hover: Images in product cards scale by 1.05x smoothly over 500ms. Buttons background colors transition over 300ms.
micro_interactions.cart_drawer: Use Framer Motion for drawer entrance (x: '100%' to x: 0) with gentle spring or ease-out tween.
micro_interactions.page_transitions: Fade in on mount to maintain the serene, natural luxury feel.

hero_and_backgrounds.description: Golden podium with fern shadow. Perfect for hero sections or main product feature.
Green leaves on white. Ideal for 'About Us' or 'Ingredients' sections.

products_and_categories.description: Lotion on rock. Use for specific product detail pages.
Jar of cream on rock. Good for catalog or PDP.
Jars sitting on a table. Good for product grids.
Various skincare bottles arranged on a shelf. Good for B2B or main category page.

abstract_textures.description: Three beige pedestals. Good as an abstract layout filler.

testing.attribute_requirement: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case format reflecting their role. e.g., 'cart-drawer-checkout-btn'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Prioritize optical alignment over strict geometric alignment for all text elements.

Use standard HTML tags and Tailwind classes for marketing page structures. Limit Shadcn usage to interactive components (forms, dialogs) and thoroughly customize their CSS to match the 'Natural Luxury' aesthetic.
For the Admin panel, rely heavily on Shadcn components for speed and utility, but override default blues/grays to match the Ecoandes earthy palette (Sage green primary).
Integrate Framer Motion for the fluid cart side-drawer and simple page transitions.
Dual Pricing functionality: ensure the UI gracefully handles the display of B2C pricing and B2B pricing states depending on user authentication.
Do NOT use 'Inter' or 'Roboto' fonts. Ensure 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' (or similar elegant sans-serifs) are loaded.
When applying overlays to hero images, NEVER use solid black. Use bg-white/40 or a gentle gradient that preserves the image's organic aesthetic.
